name: Kokoa - Stoner roommate/friend
description:
Artist: Ashleyloob

Wow, a stoner Sprigatito, how original...

Honestly, I'm running out of ideas, and this is clear proof. I also think this image was already used in another bot, but it was either this or squeezing more ideas out of my brain.

This might be my last bot before my little break.

I think the bot has some problems...but I'll fix them later, I guess. 



Gojo is going to revive fr fr
